textByHash.0029b178e2ef30eaa140c24a22f0f629eec4b980: Take care, my child. May the sun light your way.
textByHash.11d00ffe178a5c7ad5220e0cfe9414aff78df4c2: That is something we sadly don't know. It is why the obelisk is especially important to those who serve Ranul. It is a reminder of the importance in ensuring knowledge is preserved.
textByHash.813d761c9907545505b8107615608d45b779df83: It was built by those who wandered these lands before we did. They worshipped Ralos and Ranul just as we now do. The obelisk was a site of great religious importance to them, and so it is to us as well.
textByHash.9c225f9a6ae722416bedda855635844064fedd04: My companion and I are the teoki responsible for the Proudspire obelisk, one of our most precious holy sites. However, the peak of the mountain is not overly welcoming, so we keep our camp down here.
textByHash.d3db7dc40acf47e07565f5555cb5317cf8d74467: Nilsal, my child. Welcome to our humble camp. Do stop and rest if you need to.
